_comment: Declarative shot-list for `make screenshots`. Add a screenshot by adding an entry — no code change. `out` is written under sysmanage-docs/assets/images/. Shot types: route=goto+screenshot (optional `tab` clicks a MUI tab); report=drive the Reports UI by `reportName` (optional `tab`); detail=goto a list `route`, click the row matching `rowText`, then optional `tab`. `doc` records which doc page the shot is for.

shots.name: dashboard
shots.desc: Main dashboard with populated tiles

shots.name: updates
shots.desc: Available updates across hosts

shots._note: The Reports page (registered-hosts / hosts-with-tags / users / etc.) renders report CONTENT only with the Pro+ reporting_engine module (OSS returns HTTP 402). Those shots are deferred to pass-two (tier capture); on OSS the page is just a card grid, so we do not regenerate them here.
shots.name: _reports-are-pro-plus

shots._note: Expanded coverage (added 2026-06). New host-detail tabs backed by host_roles/host_certificates seed data (gen_seed_sql.py), cross-OS hardware/software tabs, and previously-uncaptured top-level pages. Embedded into the feature docs after the first capture run that generates them.

shots._note: Rendered report CONTENT (not the catalog): ReportViewer renders at /reports/<id>. Report content is Pro+ (reporting_engine); host/user reports captured in the Pro pass, firewall/AV reports in the Enterprise pass where that data is seeded.

shots.desc: Metric time-series graph — click the first row's Graph icon to render the seeded sample line chart

shots.name: ent-federation-hosts
shots.desc: Federation → Hosts (cross-site host inventory). Role-gated: only renders under federation_role=coordinator, so it is re-captured in screenshots-ent-roles Pass A (not the plain enterprise pass, which shows the coordinator upsell).
